notes: Token estimate uses a simple UTF-8 bytes/4 heuristic because a tokenizer library was not installed locally.
CoplayDev tools/list is measured from the packaged stdio MCP server (mcpforunityserver==9.4.7).
CoplayDev exposes no direct build tool in tools/list, so build roundtrip cost is N/A on that stack.

tools_list.text: [{"name":"unityctl_scene_snapshot","description":"Capture a snapshot of all scene objects and their serialized properties","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"project":{"description":"Path to the Unity project directory","type":"string"},"scenePath":{"description":"Filter to a specific scene path (optional)","type":["string","null"],"default":null}},"required":["project"]},"execution":{"taskSupport":"optional"}},{"name":"unityctl_scene_diff","description":"Compare the current scene against the last captured snapshot to report property-level changes","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"project":{"description":"Path to the Unity project directory","type":"string"},"epsilon":{"description":"Float comparison threshold (default: 1e-6)","type":"number","default":1e-06}},"required":["project"]},"execution":{"taskSupport":"optional"}},{"name":"unityctl_build","description":"Build a Unity project for a target platform","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"project":{"description":"Path to the Unity project directory","type":"string"},"target":{"description":"Build target (StandaloneWindows64, OSX, Linux, Android, iOS, WebGL)","type":"string","default":"StandaloneWindows64"},"output":{"description":"Output path for build artifacts","type":["string","null"],"default":null},"dryRun":{"description":"Validate without building (preflight check only)","type":"boolean","default":false}},"required":["project"]},"execution":{"taskSupport":"optional"}},{"name":"unityctl_check","description":"Check whether Unity scripts compiled successfully","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"project":{"description":"Path to the Unity project directory","type":"string"},"type":{"description":"Check type (default: compile)","type":"string","default":"compile"}},"required":["project"]},"execution":{"taskSupport":"optional"}},{"name":"unityctl_log","description":"Query recent command execution logs from the error)","type":["string","null"],"default":null}}}},{"name":"unityctl_schema","description":"Return the machine-readable JSON schema of all available unityctl commands (tool discovery)","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{}}},{"name":"unityctl_watch","description":"Collect real-time events from a running Unity Editor for a fixed window (poll mode)","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"project":{"description":"Path to the Unity project directory","type":"string"},"channel":{"description":"Event channel: console, hierarchy, compilation, all (default: all)","type":"string","default":"all"},"windowSeconds":{"description":"Collection window in seconds (default: 5)","type":"integer","default":5}},"required":["project"]},"execution":{"taskSupport":"optional"}},{"name":"unityctl_test","description":"Start Unity tests (EditMode or PlayMode) and wait for results","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"project":{"description":"Path to the Unity project directory","type":"string"},"mode":{"description":"Test mode: edit or play (default: edit)","type":"string","default":"edit"},"filter":{"description":"Test name filter expression","type":["string","null"],"default":null},"wait":{"description":"Wait for test completion (default: true)","type":"boolean","default":true},"timeout":{"description":"Timeout in seconds when waiting (default: 300)","type":"integer","default":300}},"required":["project"]},"execution":{"taskSupport":"optional"}},{"name":"unityctl_session_list","description":"List active and recent command execution sessions","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{}},"execution":{"taskSupport":"optional"}},{"name":"unityctl_ping","description":"Verify unityctl connectivity to a running Unity Editor","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"project":{"description":"Path to the Unity project directory","type":"string"}},"required":["project"]},"execution":{"taskSupport":"optional"}},{"name":"unityctl_exec","description":"Execute a C# expression in the Unity Editor via reflection (trust the agent)","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"project":{"description":"Path to the Unity project directory","type":"string"},"code":{"description":"C# expression to evaluate (e.g. 'EditorApplication.isPlaying = true')","type":"string"}},"required":["project","code"]},"execution":{"taskSupport":"optional"}},{"name":"unityctl_status","description":"Check Unity editor and project compilation status","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"project":{"description":"Path to the Unity project directory","type":"string"},"wait":{"description":"Retry until editor responds (default: false)","type":"boolean","default":false}},"required":["project"]},"execution":{"taskSupport":"optional"}}]

[{"name":"batch_execute","title":"Batch Execute","description":"Executes multiple MCP commands in a single batch for dramatically better performance. STRONGLY RECOMMENDED when creating/modifying multiple objects, adding components to multiple targets, or performing any repetitive operations. Reduces latency and token costs by 10-100x compared to sequential tool calls. The max commands per batch is configurable in the Unity MCP Tools window (default 25, hard max 100). Example: creating 5 cubes → use 1 batch_execute with 5 create commands instead of 5 separate calls.","inputSchema":{"properties":{"commands":{"description":"List of commands with 'tool' and 'params' keys.","items":{"additionalProperties":true,"type":"object"},"type":"array"},"parallel":{"anyOf":[{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null,"description":"Attempt to run read-only commands in parallel"},"fail_fast":{"anyOf":[{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null,"description":"Stop processing after the first failure"},"max_parallelism":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null,"description":"Hint for the maximum number of parallel workers"}},"required":["commands"],"type":"object"},"outputSchema":{"additionalProperties":true,"type":"object"},"annotations":{"title":"Batch Execute","destructiveHint":true},"_meta":{"_fastmcp":{"tags":[]}}},{"name":"debug_request_context","title":"Debug Request Context","description":"Return the current FastMCP request context details (client_id, session_id, and meta dump).","inputSchema":{"properties":{},"type":"object"},"outputSchema":{"additionalProperties":true,"type":"object"},"annotations":{"title":"Debug Request Actions: get_info, get_hierarchy, create_from_gameobject, modify_contents. Use modify_contents for headless prefab editing - ideal for automated workflows. Use create_child parameter with modify_contents to add child GameObjects to a prefab (single object or array for batch creation in one save). Example: create_child=[{\"name\": \"Child1\", \"primitive_type\": \"Sphere\", \"position\": [1,0,0]}, {\"name\": \"Child2\", \"primitive_type\": \"Cube\", \"parent\": \"Child1\"}]. Use component_properties with modify_contents to set serialized fields on existing components (e.g. component_properties={\"Rigidbody\": {\"mass\": 5.0}, \"MyScript\": {\"health\": 100}}). Supports object references via {\"guid\": \"...\"}, {\"path\": \"Assets/...\"}, or {\"instanceID\": 123}. Use manage_asset action=search filterType=Prefab to list prefabs.","inputSchema":{"properties":{"action":{"description":"Prefab operation to Can optionally wait for readiness.","inputSchema":{"properties":{"mode":{"default":"if_dirty","description":"Refresh mode","enum":["if_dirty","force"],"type":"string"},"scope":{"default":"all","description":"Refresh scope","enum":["assets","scripts","all"],"type":"string"},"compile":{"default":"none","description":"Whether to request compilation","enum":["none","request"],"type":"string"},"wait_for_ready":{"default":true,"description":"If true, wait until editor_state.advice.ready_for_tools is true","type":"boolean"}},"type":"object"},"outputSchema":{"$defs":{"MCPResponse":{"properties":{"success":{"type":"boolean"},"message":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null},"error":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null},"data":{"anyOf":[{},{"type":"null"}],"default":null},"hint":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null}},"required":["success"],"type":"object"}},"properties":{"result":{"anyOf":[{"$ref":"#/$defs/MCPResponse"},{"additionalProperties":true,"type":"object"}]}},"required":["result"],"type":"object","x-fastmcp-wrap-result":true},"annotations":{"title":"Refresh Unity","destructiveHint":true},"_meta":{"_fastmcp":{"tags":[]}}},{"name":"apply_text_edits","title":"Apply Text Edits","description":"Apply small text edits to a C# script identified by URI.\n    IMPORTANT: This tool replaces EXACT character positions. Always verify content at target lines/columns BEFORE editing!\n    RECOMMENDED WORKFLOW:\n        1. First call resources/read with start_line/line_count to verify exact content\n        2. prefer this over raw text.\n    Best practices:\n    - Prefer anchor_* ops for pattern-based insert/replace near stable markers\n    - Use replace_method/delete_method for whole-method changes (keeps signatures balanced)\n    - Avoid whole-file regex deletes; validators will guard unbalanced braces\n    - For tail insertions, prefer anchor/regex_replace on final brace (class closing)\n    - Pass options.validate='standard' for structural checks; 'relaxed' for interior-only edits\n    Canonical fields (use these exact keys):\n    - op: replace_method | insert_method | delete_method | anchor_insert | anchor_delete | anchor_replace\n    - className: string (defaults to 'name' if omitted on method/class ops)\n    - methodName: string (required for replace_method, delete_method)\n    - replacement: string (required for replace_method, insert_method)\n    - position: start | end | after | before (insert_method only)\n    - afterMethodName / beforeMethodName: string (required when position='after'/'before')\n    - anchor: regex string (for anchor_* ops)\n    - text: string (for anchor_insert/anchor_replace)\n    Examples:\n    1) Replace a method:\n    {\n        \"name\": \"SmartReach\",\n        \"path\": \"Assets/Scripts/Interaction\",\n        \"edits\": [\n        {\n        \"op\": \"replace_method\",\n        \"className\": \"SmartReach\",\n        \"methodName\": \"HasTarget\",\n        \"replacement\": \"public bool HasTarget(){ return currentTarget!=null; }\"\n        }\n    ],\n    \"options\": {\"validate\": \"standard\", \"refresh\": \"immediate\"}\n    }\n    \"2) Insert a method after another:\n    {\n        \"name\": \"SmartReach\",\n        \"path\": \"Assets/Scripts/Interaction\",\n        \"edits\": [\n        {\n        \"op\": \"insert_method\",\n        \"className\": \"SmartReach\",\n        \"replacement\": \"public void PrintSeries(){ Debug.Log(seriesName); }\",\n        \"position\": \"after\",\n        \"afterMethodName\": \"GetCurrentTarget\"\n        }\n    ],\n    }\n    ]","inputSchema":{"properties":{"name":{"description":"Name of the script to edit","type":"string"},"path":{"description":"Path to the script to edit under Assets/ directory","type":"string"},"edits":{"anyOf":[{"items":{"additionalProperties":true,"type":"object"},"type":"array"},{"type":"string"}],"description":"List of edits to apply to the script (JSON list or stringified JSON)"},"options":{"anyOf":[{"additionalProperties":true,"type":"object"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null},"script_type":{"default":"MonoBehaviour","description":"Type of the script to
